subcodes.first_line: O descendant of that glorious personage! Your verses are like lustrous pearls and royal gems, the very embodiment of eloquence and rhetoric [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حفید آن شخص جلیل اشعار چون لئالی آبدار و در شاهوار در نهایت فصاحت و بلاغت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @role and station of women, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual transformation
